parameters.query: INSERT INTO roster (discord_id, name, clockify_id, active) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4) ON CONFLICT (discord_id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, clockify_id = EXCLUDED.clockify_id, active = EXCLUDED.active
INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json) VALUES ('bot_discord_id', $1::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json, updated_at = now()

body.content: =Pipemind startup complete. Roster loaded with {{ $json.member_count }} members. All required config present.
